title: Dons
description: A modpack made for Dons Community, featuring creatures, decorations, bosses, optimization, automation, and more — with a strong focus on the Create mod.
body:
# Dons Community Modpack [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/-DISCORD-2C2F33?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white&labelColor=5865F2)](https://discord.gg/GvG9gMp47E) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/-MODRINTH-2C2F33?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&labelColor=1BD96A)](https://modrinth.com/user/morcxlla) [![MCX.ROCKS](https://img.shields.io/badge/-MCX.ROCKS-2C2F33?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=5865F2)](https://mcx.rocks) Welcome to the **Dons Community Modpack**, a custom selection of mods designed to bring the ultimate Minecraft experience to our community. This pack combines **exploration, adventure, decoration, creatures, bosses, optimization, automation**, and much more — with the spotlight on the **Create** mod and its many addons, making engineering and creativity the heart of the gameplay. Whether you want to build complex factories, decorate your world, fight mythical creatures, or simply explore with better performance and tools, this pack has a bit of everything for everyone. ## ✨ Features - **Create & Addons**: A wide range of expansions to push the boundaries of automation and machines. - **Creatures & Adventure**: New mobs, mounts, and bosses to challenge your skills. - **Decoration**: Furniture, building blocks, lighting, windows, bridges, and more to design beautiful worlds. - **Optimization**: Mods that improve performance and fix memory leaks. - **Exploration**: New structures, biomes, maps, and utilities for better navigation. - **Convenience & Tools**: Backpacks, storage upgrades, teleportation stones, security systems, and more. ## 📜 Mod List
⚙️ Create & Addons - [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) - [Create Crafts & Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/createaddition) - [Create: Enchantment Industry](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-enchantment-industry) - [Create: Diesel Generators](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-diesel-generators) - [Create: Armory](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-armory) - [Create Nuclear](https://modrinth.com/mod/createnuclear) - [Create Sifting](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-sifting) - [Create Utilities](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-utilities) - [Create Slice & Dice](https://modrinth.com/mod/slice-and-dice) - [Create: Central Kitchen](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-central-kitchen) - [Create: pneumatic equipment](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-pneumatic-equipment) - [Create Mechanical Extruder](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-mechanical-extruder) - [Create: Quality of Life ](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-qol) - [Create Ratatouille ](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-ratatouille)
🐾 Creatures & Adventure - [Mowzie's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/mowzies-mobs) - [Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs) - [Mythic Mounts](https://modrinth.com/mod/mythic-mounts) - [Sons of Sins](https://modrinth.com/mod/sons-of-sins)
🏠 Decoration & Building - [Macaw's Trapdoors](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-trapdoors) - [Macaw's Lights and Lamps](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-lights-and-lamps) - [Macaw's Stairs](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-stairs) - [Macaw's Windows](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-windows) - [Macaw's Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-furniture) - [Macaw's Doors](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-doors) - [Macaw's Paintings](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-paintings) - [Macaw's Roofs](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-roofs) - [Macaw's Bridges](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-bridges) - [Macaw's Paths and Pavings](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-paths-and-pavings) - [Macaw's Fences and Walls](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-fences-and-walls) - [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) - [Amendments](https://modrinth.com/mod/amendments) - [KleeSlabs](https://modrinth.com/mod/kleeslabs) - [Connected Glass](https://modrinth.com/mod/connected-glass) - [Fusion (Connected Textures)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fusion-connected-textures)
🌍 Exploration & World - [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) - [JourneyMap](https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap) - [Explorer's Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/explorers-compass) - [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith) - [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra)
🧰 Tools & Utilities - [Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack) - [ElevatorMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/elevatormod) - [SecurityCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/security-craft) - [Storage Drawers](https://modrinth.com/mod/storagedrawers) - [Tom's Simple Storage Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage) - [Iron Chests: Restocked](https://modrinth.com/mod/ironchests) - [Iron Furnaces](https://modrinth.com/mod/iron-furnaces) - [Carry On](https://modrinth.com/mod/carry-on) - [Reap Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/reap-mod) - [Torcherino](https://modrinth.com/mod/torcherino) - [Jade 🔍](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) - [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) - [Melody](https://modrinth.com/mod/melody) - [Pro Placer](https://modrinth.com/mod/pro-placer) - [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
💻 Optimization & Performance - [Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix) - [Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps) - [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium)
📚 Libraries & APIs - [Balm](https://modrinth.com/mod/balm) - [Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli) - [Citadel](https://modrinth.com/mod/citadel) - [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) - [Botarium](https://modrinth.com/mod/botarium) - [Petrolpark's Library](https://modrinth.com/mod/petrolpark) - [Petrol's Parts](https://modrinth.com/mod/petrols-parts) - [Moonlight Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/moonlight) - [Bookshelf](https://modrinth.com/mod/bookshelf-lib) - [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) - [SuperMartijn642's Core Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/supermartijn642s-core-lib) - [Kotlin for Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/kotlin-for-forge) - [Puzzles Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzles-lib) - [Resourceful Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourceful-lib) - [Resourceful Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourceful-config)
🎨 Visuals & Shaders - [Oculus](https://modrinth.com/mod/oculus) - [Complementary Shaders - Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) - [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) - [Faithful 32x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-32x) - [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) - [ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) - [EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
🍎 Miscellaneous - [GraveStone Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/gravestone-mod) - [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) - [Enchantment Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions)
Made by [MCX](https://mcx.rocks) with 🥚.
